title: quercus estremadurensis
intro: Quercus estremadurensis, also known as the Extremaduran oak, is a species of deciduous tree that belongs to the Fagaceae family. This plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits associated with Quercus estremadurensis include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce the risk of certain cancers, and improve cardiovascular health. Quercus estremadurensis is often used in herbal preparations, such as tea infusions and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
